title: Merge Sort
code:
mergesort :: [num] -> [num]
mergesort []  = []
mergesort [x] = [x]
mergesort xs  = merge (mergesort left) (mergesort right)
                where
                left  = take half xs
                right = drop half xs
                half  = #xs div 2

merge :: [num] -> [num] -> [num]
merge [] ys         = ys
merge xs []         = xs
merge (x:xs) (y:ys) = x : merge xs (y:ys), if x <= y
                    = y : merge (x:xs) ys, otherwise
description: Miranda merge sort using guarded equations (`if`/`otherwise` on the right-hand side). The `#` operator gives list length, and `take`/`drop` split at the midpoint. Miranda's `where` clauses bind local definitions.
